hub_subtitle: Business English from the ground up -- your work, your team, your routine

lesson.menu_desc: Present continuous (now vs routine) -- say what you are working on right now -- 29 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 12 -- Talking About Now -- What Are You Working On?
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Danilo Febba | Aula 12 -- Talking About Now

listenings.text: Hi Danilo, it's Rachel. Here is a quick update on the team right now. I am sending you the new dashboard, so please check your email in a minute. Lucas is running the data pipeline at the moment, and it is loading the last reports. Maria is updating the numbers for the client call. I am not in the office today; I am working from home. Everyone is busy, but everything is going well. I am writing the agenda right now, and I am focusing on the most important points. Talk soon. Bye!

It is nine o'clock, and I am at my desk right now. Normally, on Mondays, I run the data pipeline early in the morning. But today is different. At the moment, I am not running the pipeline; I am fixing a bug with my team. Lucas is typing the new code, and I am checking every line on my screen. We are discussing the best solution right now. Maria is loading the test data, and the system is updating slowly. It is a busy morning, but I like it. Right now, we are solving a real problem together, and this is my favorite part of the job.
